name: Blue Origin

overview.value: Blue Origin is an American privately funded aerospace manufacturer and spaceflight services company set up by Amazon.com founder Jeff Bezos with its headquarters in Kent, Washington. The company is developing technologies to enable private human access to space with the goal to dramatically lower costs and increase reliability. Blue Origin currently launches its New Shepard sub-orbital vehicle from its West Texas launch site, they are currently constructing a launch pad for their orbital vehicle New Glenn at Cape Canaveral LC-36.

notes: Seeded with the Orbits facilities layer (2026-07-05); remaining fields await sourced fill by the weekly maintenance run.

events.headline: Blue Origin and ULA agree to jointly fund development of BE-4 engine
Blue Origin flies Jeff Bezos on New Shepard's first crewed mission
NASA selects Blue Origin as second Artemis Human Landing System provider
New Shepard returns to flight with NS-24 after NS-23 failure (per Spaceflight Now)
NASA raises Blue Origin's Orbital Reef space station funding to $172 million
New Glenn reaches orbit on its first launch (per SpaceNews)
Blue Origin lands New Glenn booster for first time on second flight
Blue Origin's Blue Moon Mark 1 manifested for lunar south pole CLPS delivery
